title: Smooth Dynamic light
body:
Need dynamic light? No problem! It’s fully supported across many versions, from 1.20 to 26.1.2, and works with all major loaders. Geyser is supported too, with or without Floodgate, and the lighting itself is smooth and fluid for a seamless experience.

/dlight on  
/dlight off  
/dlight toggle 

The plugin has a configuration file where you can customize a lot.
![Dynamic Light Show case](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de4d6aaebf63a052af65d6dab506544cc881bac3_0.webp)

![dynamic light](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/990f7e0003a3ee96029973a87141755bdeda5598.png)

![dynamic light item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e400fb26e4a56377f509d766a551175b47b399f.png)
